register.note: Full-width before/after diptych whose leaked-tilt-vs-honest-flat contrast is legible as a thumbnail; held off 4 by near-identical twin scatters distinguished mainly by trend angle + R².

Draws the failure mechanism itself — the held-out trend manufacturing slope from pure noise (R² 0.41) on the left vs lying flat (R² -0.08) on the right against the predicted=actual diagonal — exemplar-grade for the concept.
Per-panel kicker, R² readouts, the predicted=actual mark, and notes carry the meaning on the graphic; competent labeling short of Distill's per-state math captions.
Warm calm surface, hairline borders, single focal canvas, AA tinted terms (smooth, not aliased); flat dots and Run/Break lower-left voids keep it off 4.
A Run-it toggle swinging the scatter + per-fold R² bars, a hands-on Break-it loop, a stepped See-it rail, and one hero load-fade clear the floor at 3.
Prediction-blue throughout, error-red reserved only for the leaked R², honest R² neutral, no all-red field; mono-blue + one accent is less rich than R2D3's two-hue vocabulary.

hero.note: Poster-worthy full-width before/after on the same noise — leaked tilt R² 0.41 vs honest flat R² -0.08 against the predicted=actual diagonal — with per-panel readouts and a single load fade.

assessment.note: Item 05 is a genuine open free-text transfer prompt gated by 'commit your own first'; item 04 is a hands-on lab task.

verdict.summary: Clears register 3 — the new hero is the strongest frame in the set (mechanism 4, protagonist 3); remaining gap to flagship is pure compositional finish.
